nodes.context: A subset of the Bloods gang alliance, based in Los Angeles, involved in drug trafficking, robbery, extortion, and murder.
A larger gang alliance that includes the Pirus, formed in opposition to the Crips.
A rival gang to the Bloods and Pirus, founded by Raymond Washington and Stanley 'Tookie' Williams.
A smaller street gang that allied with the Pirus to form the Bloods.
A smaller street gang that allied with the Pirus to form the Bloods.
A smaller street gang that allied with the Pirus to form the Bloods.
A Piru set that had a rivalry with Fruit Town Piru.
A Piru set that had a rivalry with Mob Piru.
An ally of the Pirus according to the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: The Pirus ( / ˈ p aɪ . r uː / ⓘ ) are a subset of the larger Bloods gang alliance
edges.context: The Pirus are a subset of the Bloods alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: A group of young African Americans from Compton and nearby areas felt threatened by the Crips' dominance. They refused to submit, and eventually formed their own gang as the main rival to the Crips.
edges.context: The Pirus formed as a rival to the Crips.

edges.evidence_quote: the 300 Playboy Piru Bloods formed an alliance with other smaller street gangs such as the Brims, Bishops and Denver Lanes, which also opposed the Crips.
edges.context: The Pirus allied with the Brims to oppose the Crips.

edges.evidence_quote: the 300 Playboy Piru Bloods formed an alliance with other smaller street gangs such as the Brims, Bishops and Denver Lanes, which also opposed the Crips.
edges.context: The Pirus allied with the Bishops to oppose the Crips.

edges.evidence_quote: the 300 Playboy Piru Bloods formed an alliance with other smaller street gangs such as the Brims, Bishops and Denver Lanes, which also opposed the Crips.
edges.context: The Pirus allied with the Denver Lanes to oppose the Crips.

edges.evidence_quote: the Mob Piru and Fruit Town Piru developed a rivalry by the late 1990s, which resulted in the murders of several Mob Pirus associated with Death Row Records.
edges.context: Mob Piru and Fruit Town Piru had a rivalry that led to murders.
The infobox lists Juggalos as allies of the Pirus.
